prompt: A [building type] undergoing [impossible material transformation] — [lens] wide, the [impossible material transformation] in progress across the building's entire exterior, [original material] giving way to [transformed material] from [transformation origin point], the [impossible material transformation] at a stage where both [original material] and [transformed material] are simultaneously present, [human observers] in the frame treating the transformation with curiosity rather than alarm, [light quality] photorealistic and making no special case for the impossibility, surrealist architectural transformation still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
